programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Wade is on the hunt to learn what was behind a river boat attack where over 200 people were killed.

programme.desc: A closer look at Australia's arid landscape and the incredible battles between predators and prey.

programme.desc: Patrick Aryee embarks on a remarkable journey through the feline family tree.

programme.title: San Diego: America's Wildest City
programme.desc: Experience San Diego's biodiversity thriving among a human population of 3.3 million residents.

programme.title: Hot Life Africa
programme.desc: A look at the cheetah's most effective tricks to cope with its scorching environment.

programme.desc: Jeremy risks a curse if he touches a mysterious creature haunting Himalayan rivers.

programme.title: The Americas
programme.desc: Mexico, where deserts meet tropics; see new footage of fledgling pygmy owls, orca hunting and more.

programme.desc: As lockdown eases, people start to return and the Zambia gang perfect their ambushing techniques.
